subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, and with the key of wisdom have We opened the gate of grace and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات و فتحنا بمفتاح الحکمه باب الفضل و العطاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
